name_en: 【Top Grade】Price Adjustment New Black Hardware 🔥 With full set of packaging Aria- Fashion Aria series continues to explore brand heritage elements. As a member of the GG Marmont elite handbag collection, the GG Marmont series incorporates classic materials with vertical and diagonal patterns to create a unique geometric style design! Features an internal open pocket, large phone compartment, and spring and flap closures.
